projects.title: MATAZZ Basel
projects.shortDescription: A spatial visual setup for a MATAZZ event in Basel.
projects.longDescription: This project explores projected atmospheres, event identity and live visual material. The goal was to support the music and the social energy of the space without overpowering it.

projects.title: Pakshiraj
projects.shortDescription: A sensory mask designed to make people feel how birds perceive electromagnetic fields.
projects.longDescription: Pakshiraj is inspired by the heightened sensitivity birds have to electromagnetic fields, which they use for navigation. The project translates this alien sense into a wearable experience: a mask embedded with reactive LEDs and headphones playing spatial ambient noise. When worn, the user experiences a disorienting sensation meant to approximate what a bird might perceive when flying through areas of electromagnetic interference.

projects.title: Addictive FarbMischung
projects.shortDescription: An interactive light system using a joystick, Arduino and TouchDesigner to control three RGB light sources.
projects.longDescription: Created for Licht, Farbe und Interaktion, this project explores additive color mixing through space, layers and interaction. A joystick connected to Arduino sends control data to TouchDesigner, which drives three RGB lights. The lights converge toward a wall to create white light. Between the lamps and the wall, two layers of tulle make the mixing process visible.

projects.title: Classroom 3D Models
projects.shortDescription: Two classroom environments modelled as spatial studies.
projects.longDescription: These models focus on proportion, atmosphere and object-based worldbuilding. Technical modelling practice with attention to light, surfaces and details.

projects.title: Jurassia
projects.shortDescription: A 3D worldbuilding project exploring landscape, atmosphere and narrative space.
projects.longDescription: Environment design, visual storytelling and spatial imagination: a world built from light and geometry.

projects.title: MATAZZ - Oltre la Pietra
projects.shortDescription: Collective exhibition at Castelgrande with projections, interviews, documentation and web content.
projects.longDescription: My role moved between visual atmosphere, technical setup, video loops, artist interviews, documentation and the translation of artists' voices into written material for the online archive.

projects.title: Permaculture and Growing Plants
projects.shortDescription: A research-oriented project around plant growth, ecological systems and care.
projects.longDescription: Observation, process thinking and sensitivity toward living systems. Connecting ecology, time and design.

projects.title: Accessible Architecture Tool
projects.shortDescription: A digital design tool helping architects consider accessibility earlier in private residential projects.
projects.longDescription: Based on interviews, spatial analysis and prototyping: how accessibility can become part of the design process before it turns into a late technical correction.
